channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  2. NFL mock draft roundup: Experts predict first round before draft  USA Today
  3. 2026 NFL draft: Top prospects at 100 different skills, traits  ESPN

  5. Eight Prospects Who Will Be Steals in the 2026 NFL Draft  Sports Illustrated

item.title: Katy Perry denies Ruby Rose’s sexual assault allegations: ‘Dangerous reckless lies’ - Los Angeles Times
item.description:
1. Katy Perry denies Ruby Rose’s sexual assault allegations: ‘Dangerous reckless lies’  Los Angeles Times
  2. Ruby Rose accuses Katy Perry of sexual assault, singer denies  USA Today
  3. Katy Perry's Rep Strongly Denied Ruby Rose's Claim That Katy Previously Sexually Assaulted Her In A Melbourne Nightclub  Yahoo News Canada
  4. Ruby Rose Claims Katy Perry Sexually Assaulted Her Nearly 20 Years Ago, Perry's Rep Denies It as 'Reckless Lies'  People.com
  5. Ruby Rose Accuses Katy Perry of Sexual Assault; Perry Denies Claim  Variety
